title: CAIA Autonomous System — 24h Walkaway View
description: Single-pane-of-glass for the operator to walk away for 24h and check health, throughput, failures, resources, backlog, lineage, and subscription guard. Comprehensive Observability deploy 2026-05-10.

panels.title: Health Overview — is the system breathing?

options.content:
**Slot Manager:** `slot_manager_up=1` indicates 0.4.0-phase4 alive.  
**SPS:** see `sps_info{version,phase}` panel.  
**Subscription guard:** `subscription_guard_at_startup=true` baked into both services. Any non-zero `caia_subscription_rejection_total` (synthetic — emitted on guard violation) fires the SubscriptionGuardViolation alert (page-immediately).

panels.title: Throughput — how fast are we draining?
Spawn duration p50/p95 (slot-manager view, by bucket)
SPS claim latency p50/p95 (ms, from in-process ring)
Autonomous loop skip reasons /min (no_work / no_slot / budget / throttled)
Resource utilization — slots / budgets / host pressure
Slots in use vs free (cluster, by bucket)
Spawn budget — tokens remaining vs cap (per bucket)
Slot status by bucket (free / claimed / occupied / draining / disabled)

targets.expr: sps_bucket_ready or sps_bucket_inflight or sps_bucket_queue_depth or sps_bucket_dead_letter or sps_bucket_stuck or sps_bucket_cap or sps_bucket_enabled

panels.title: Backlog trend — ready / in-flight / queue / DLQ / stuck (cluster total)
Lineage tree — parent → child spawn relationships (recent, depth ≥ 1)
Recent spawn lineage events (Loki, slot-manager logs)
How to walk a lineage chain

options.content:
Click a `spawn_id` in the Loki panel above, then run from any shell with cluster access:

```
SM=10.43.173.170:8081
curl -sS http://$SM/spawn-lineage/<spawn_id> | jq
```

Returns ancestors (root → leaf) and immediate children. Relations: `autonomous-claim` (root), `retry-of` (after a transient outcome), `replay-of` (manual DLQ replay), `decomposed-into` (parent claude split work), `continuation` (operator restart of a long-running spawn).

panels.title: Subscription guard — zero-dollar invariant (must always be 0 violations)

options.content:
**Invariants (any breach = stop work, page operator immediately):**

1. `slot_manager_autonomy_state{state="circuit-broken"}` MUST be 0 due to API-key presence.
2. Every `/spawn` MUST echo `subscription_only=true`. Loki query above filters to those events.
3. No `rejected_guard` events should EVER appear post-deploy.

If anything in the panel above shows `subscription_only=false`, `api_key_guard_failed`, or `rejected_guard`: stop, page, file an incident.
